condition: player.docked and player.location == "sorrow_station" and "bought_grissom_drink" in player.flags and not ("grissom_said_his_piece" in player.flags)

opens.text: He sees you and lifts two fingers off the bar — not a wave, an acknowledgment of debt. — You bought a drink for a man about to do something stupid. Didn't stop me. Wasn't your job to. But I drank it, and I remember it, which is more than I can say for the rest of that night.

next_one.text: When the commercial deck's back up and I'm working again — yeah. It is. — He almost smiles, discovers his face out of practice, abandons the attempt. — Your machine hits like a docking clamp, by the way. Tell her the wrist respects the wrist.
